title: Hypheria
description: This is a cobblemon modpack that adds the very best mods for longterm gameplay.
body:
This modpack is for those who want the best experience playing Cobblemon for a long period of time.
It covers anything from playing and battling in cobblemon to building with amazing building blocks to something as neat as finding your cobble buddies some new skins to as intense as many different weapons and dimensions.

A solo mode is finally available for those wanting to give it a try.

++If you like a mod make sure to go check out the creators!!++
